subject: fix(audit): address 11 code quality findings across services and components
body:
Race conditions fixed in embeddingService and tagSuggestionService init
(module-level progress callback ref replaces w.onmessage overwriting),
batch promise setup ordering, suggestLabels timeout leak. Added bounds
validation to expandByHops, null guard in AnalysisPanel, toast feedback
in TimelineView, ARIA semantics to DetailDrawer and ContextMenu, and
extracted MergeCard component in DuplicateScannerModal.

Tags: audit, race-condition, accessibility, services, components
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality-audit
Semver: patch
